name: Carrie Smith
abstract: Carrie Louise Smith (August 25, 1925 – May 20, 2012) was an American blues and jazz singer. She was not well known in the United States but had a small following in Europe.

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: I was working with a singer named Carrie Smith who my mother got me a job with, this was in the early 80s.
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Sammy Price
about_quotes.evidence: And Jay McShann played there, Carrie Smith and a lot of people...gospel singers.
